rows.finalText: Around "What is the next right step in my calling", the reading gathers most strongly around purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. In Past, Querent (29) shows where things already stand: your role and boundaries set the tone. Querent colors your calling through your own stance toward the path, including how much of it is truly chosen and how much is inherited habit. In Present, Tree (5) becomes the pivot, so deep growth unfolds gradually turns into both pressure and opportunity.
